framework.name: Adaptive Coordination Governance
framework.core_principle: Good governance opens gates without forcing convergence.
framework.core_statement: AI systems should act only when orientation coherence, regulatory margin, and spectral coordination capacity support recoverable differentiated accessibility for the task.

cognitive_gates.attention_gate: What does the system make salient?
cognitive_gates.interpretation_gate: What meanings or frames become dominant?
cognitive_gates.option_gate: What actions or futures appear reachable?
cognitive_gates.time_horizon_gate: Does the interaction expand or compress future modeling?
cognitive_gates.coordination_gate: Does the interaction preserve differentiated coordination or force synchronization?
